name: Zero Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a jar with a tightly fitted top.
2. Refrigerate for several hours.
3. Shake well before using.
Yield: 1/2 C Each serving: 2 Tbsp Free Food (up to 2 servings per day)
Note: This dressing may be kept for several weeks refrigerated in a closed container.
